productDisplayName: Clarks Men Extra Look Black Formal Shoe
description: Three-hole lace-up shoe with clean, slim silhouetting, brogueing and a refined stacked heel, by clarks for men. A brogue fan's reinterpretation of the classic derby, wear this shoe crafted from leather with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers. Upper Leather upper with a tapering toe box Brogue detailing on the toe box, midfoot and heel collar Three-hole central lace-ups Padded lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Padded tongue Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Herringbone grooves on the midfoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
